rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Strike Request For Special Notice And Memorandum Of Points And Authority And Authorities In Support Of Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Request For Special Notice And Declaration Of Ruth Downs Sullivan In Support Of Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Request For Special Notice
rulings.Rulings: Administrator Vivian White's Motion to Strike Request for Special Notice is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. The motion to strike request is DENIED as to any petition for final or partial distribution. In all other matters, the motion is GRANTED. The prevailing party shall submit a proposed order. Any side wishinig to argue shall contact the court no later than 4:00 p.m. today (4/15/2014).

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DOROTHY JOAN WALLACE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to May 28, 2014 to allow time for service and response to the Summons issued as a result of the will contest. Prior to May 20, Petitioner must file a supplemental declaration clarifying that the Will is self-proving (#3.e.(2)) and correcting #6 as nieces and nephews are issue of parents, not next of kin. Also, it must clarify whether Edward Barney and Laura McQuade are also children of Isabel Wallace. If not, please identify the deceased sibling who is their parent and that sibling's date of death.
